description: Facilitates the understanding and application of the principles of pharmaceutical biotechnology and pharmacogenomics. The third, optional, elective credit, open only to Pharm.D. students, will consist of clinical case studies in biotechnology and pharmacogenomics, to apply theory to clinical pharmacy practice.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: PHM SCI 432and Declared in the Doctor of Pharmacy program with third year standing
